app.name: Wortschatz
app.tagline: Build your German vocabulary, one Wort at a time.

landing.heroBody: Wortschatz adapts to your level. Earn Münzen as you practice and spend them on personalized AI feedback.
landing.feature1Body: Ten exercise types covering grammar, vocabulary, listening, and writing.
landing.feature2Body: Complete exercises and keep your streak alive to earn the in-app currency.
landing.feature3Body: Submit your own German texts and get detailed grammar and style feedback.

auth.name: Name
auth.errorAlreadyRegistered: An account with that email already exists.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Try your first exercise!

muenzenSeries.title: Münzen over time

radar.title: Proficiency by type

exercises.browseSubtitle: Pick an exercise type to practice.
exercises.available: {count, plural, =0 {No exercises} one {# exercise} other {# exercises}}
exercises.alreadyEarned: You already earned Münzen for this exercise.

mistakes.title: My mistakes
mistakes.subtitle: Exercises where your last attempt scored below 60.
mistakes.empty: No mistakes to review — great work!

exerciseTypeDescriptions.FILL_IN_THE_BLANK: Complete sentences with the missing word.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.MULTIPLE_CHOICE: Pick the right answer from four options.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.WORD_ORDER: Rearrange the words into a correct sentence.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.MATCHING: Match German words with their translations.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.LISTENING_COMPREHENSION: Listen to a short passage and answer.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.READING_COMPREHENSION: Read a text and answer a question about it.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.VERB_CONJUGATION: Conjugate a verb in the requested tense and person.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.ERROR_CORRECTION: Spot and fix the mistake in a sentence.
exerciseTypeDescriptions.FREE_WRITING: Write a short text — graded by AI.

renderers.wordOrderEmpty: Tap words below to build the sentence.
renderers.listeningAudioMissing: Audio is coming soon — read the transcript below for now.

exerciseIntros.dontShowAgain: Don't show this again for this type.

review.insufficientFunds: You don't have enough Münzen for a review.
review.rateLimited: You've reached the daily limit for AI reviews. Try again tomorrow.
